did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a comprehensive review of existing literature on skin cancer detection strategies using deep neural networks and machine learning. It summarizes and evaluates previous studies (e.g., using ResNet, CNN, GANs on datasets like ISIC, HAM10000) but does not present original experimental results obtained by the authors using AI/ML methods themselves.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
